title: OntologyConfiguration
description: Ontology modeling and namespace settings inherited by every term in a glossary.

layer.description: Governance layer of an ontology model.

prefix.description: A compact IRI prefix and its absolute namespace.

baseIri.description: Absolute base IRI used when minting governed concepts.

imports.description: Ontology models this model depends on. Dependencies must point to the same or a more foundational layer.

prefixes.description: Prefix registry used for display, authoring, import, and export.

iriMintingPattern.description: IRI suffix pattern. Supported placeholders are {glossary}, {term}, and {uuid}.

readOnly.description: Whether the model is an installed reference model that cannot be edited directly.

installedPacks.description: Verified ontology library packs installed into this model, keyed by stable pack ID.
